info.name: User Management Engine API Collection
info.description:
Postman Collection for AndrexCodes/User-Management-Engine.

This collection maps all HTTP routes exposed by the Express application, including standard user authentication, session-based account profile updates, general routes, third-party API integration proxies, and AI demos (Groq Vision, LLM Classifier, RAG, AI Agent Chat). 

### CSRF Protection
Most POST/PUT/DELETE requests are guarded by CSRF middleware. We have exposed a dedicated endpoint to retrieve this token:
1. Send a `GET` request to `/api/csrf-token`. This request has a test script that automatically saves the retrieved token to the `CSRF_TOKEN` collection variable.
2. All POST, PUT, and DELETE requests in this collection are pre-configured to send the `X-CSRF-Token` header set to `{{CSRF_TOKEN}}`.

item.name: 1. Authentication
item.description: All routes regarding sign in, sign up, magic links, two-factor authentication (2FA), WebAuthn passwordless authentication, and forgot/reset password flows.
